zh.Maelor Gymraeg, Wrexham district, Denbig: 英國威爾斯丹比爾萊可哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine Llewellyn ap Howell於1367年出生在威爾士福林爾時，她的父親Thomas ap Llewellyn Howell27歲，母親Elinor Verch Meredith22歲。她於1386年與David Gough在英國結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1412年在威爾士蒙姆爾蒙姆斯享年45歲。

zh-hans.Maelor Gymraeg, Wrexham district, Denbig: 英国威尔斯丹比爾萊可哈姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine Llewellyn ap Howell于1367年出生在威尔士福林爾时，她的父亲Thomas ap Llewellyn Howell27岁，母亲Elinor Verch Meredith22岁。她于1386年与David Gough在英国结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1412年在威尔士蒙姆爾蒙姆斯享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: variant of   Abt  .

Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): habitational name from Apt, the Yiddish name of Opatów in Świętokrzyskie Voivodeship, Poland. The placename (in German, Yiddish, and Polish) is from a root meaning ‘abbot’, the place having been named for the local abbey. Compare   Abt  .

variants.name: Abt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Helmut, Horst, Johann, Kurt.

German and Dutch: from Middle Low German or Middle Dutch abt ‘abbot’, hence a metonymic occupational name for a servant of an abbot or a nickname for someone thought to resemble an abbot in some way. In some instances it may have been a topographic or habitational name referring to a house named with this word.
Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic): variant of   Abt  , a habitational name from Opatów in Poland.

variants.name: Apter
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Avrohom, Bronya, Eliezer, Naftali.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Apt (see   Apt  ).
English: habitational name from Aptor in Marldon, Devon, composed of Old English uppe ‘up, above’ + torr ‘rocky outcrop’.

nameMeanings.name: Howell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh and English: in the Welsh border counties, from the Welsh male personal name Hywel ‘eminent’, popular since the Middle Ages particularly in honor of the great 10th-century law-giving Welsh king. The name may also arise from the Breton personal name Houuel, Huwel, Huwal, Howael, cognate with the Welsh name. Bretons were especially numerous in the eastern counties of England. See Powell .
English: perhaps from a Middle English personal name Huwel (spelled Howel), a shortening of Huwelot or Huelin (see Hewlett and Huling ), both pet forms of Middle English Huw (see Hugh ).
English: habitational name from Howell (Lincolnshire), from an uncertain initial element + Old English wella ‘well, spring, stream’.

variants.name: Howle
meanings: English and Welsh:
variant of   Howell  .
variant of   Hole  .

variants.name: Howells
meanings: English and Welsh (Glamorgan): variant of Howell , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent English -s.

English: perhaps occasionally a nickname for someone who was fearless, from Middle English houe, houwe ‘anxiety, fear’ (Old English hogu or hoga) + les ‘less’. If this has survived as a modern surname, its pronunciation has been influenced by that of the name in 1 above.
English: variant of   Holes  .

variants.name: Powell
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Hywel ‘son of Hywel’, a personal name meaning ‘eminent’ (see Howell ).
Irish: mainly of Welsh origin as in 1 above, but sometimes a surname adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Mac Giolla Phóil ‘son of the servant of Saint Paul’ (see Guilfoyle ).
English: variant of   Paul   or   Poole  .

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: equivalent of   Katherine  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Llewellyn
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

variants.name: Llywellyn
meanings: Traditional: altered form (influenced by llew ‘lion’) of Llywelyn, an ancient name of uncertain derivation. It probably goes back to the Old Celtic name Lugobelinos, the first element of which is Lugu- (the name of a god; see Lleu ); the second is a name-forming element found also in names such as Cunobelinus (Cymbeline). The name was borne by Llywelyn ap Iorwerth ( 1173–1240 ) and his grandson Llywelyn ap Gruffydd ( d. 1282 ), Welsh princes who for a time united their countrymen in North Wales and led opposition to the power of the Norman barons in South Wales and the Marches.

variants.name: Llywelyn
meanings: (Welsh)  See  Llewelyn .

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine Llewellyn ap Howell was born in 1367, in Flintshire, Wales, her father, Thomas ap Llewellyn Howell, was 27 and her mother, Elinor Verch Meredith, was 22. She married David Gough in 1386, in England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1412, in Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Wales, at the age of 45.

fr.Maelor Gymraeg, Wrexham district, Denbig: Wrexham, Denbighshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine Llewellyn ap Howell est née en 1367, à Flintshire, Galles, son père, Thomas ap Llewellyn Howell, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Elinor Verch Meredith, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé David Gough en 1386, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1412, à Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Galles, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine Llewellyn ap Howell 1367 in Flintshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas ap Llewellyn Howell 27 und ihre Mutter Elinor Verch Meredith 22. Sie hat 1386 in England David Gough geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1412 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine Llewellyn ap Howell è nata il nel 1367 nel Flintshire, Galles, sua padre, Thomas ap Llewellyn Howell, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Elinor Verch Meredith, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato David Gough nel 1386, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1412, nel Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Galles, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Katherine Llewellyn ap Howellが1367年にウェールズフリントシュアイアで生まれた時，父Thomas ap Llewellyn Howellは27歳，母Elinor Verch Meredithは22歳であった。1386年にイギリスでDavid Goughと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1412年にウェールズモンモウスシュアイアモンモウスで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine Llewellyn ap Howell(이)가 1367년 웨일스 플린츠히르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas ap Llewellyn Howell(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elinor Verch Meredith(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1386년 영국에서 David Gough(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1412년 웨일스 몬모우스실르 몬모우스에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ela casou-se com David Gough em 1386, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1412, em Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Gales, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine Llewellyn ap Howell родилась в 1367 г. в местности флинцхир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Thomas ap Llewellyn Howell было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Elinor Verch Meredith, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени David Gough в 1386 г. в местности Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1412 г. в местности монмоут, монмоутшир, Уэльс в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine Llewellyn ap Howell nació en 1367, en Flintshire, Gales, su papá, Thomas ap Llewellyn Howell, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Elinor Verch Meredith, tenía 22 años. Se casó con David Gough en 1386, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1412, en Monmouth, Monmouthshire, Gales, a la edad de 45 años.
